tender.description: Cleaning and removal of loose coal/debris proposed in FY 2026-27 for CM Panels i.e. 120 Dip (IInd belt), 85LW belt and 90LW Belt Conveyor, on day to day basis in V-Top Seam at Baherabandh UG Mine of Hasdeo Area.
